channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate Leader Pushes for Continued SEA Games and Flood Control Investigations
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Alan Peter Cayetano has called on the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) to continue its probe into alleged anomalies in the 2019 Southeast Asian Games (SEA Games) projects....

item.title: Shooting during memorial service injures child and three others in Steenberg Park
item.description: A tragic mass shooting occurred at Steenberg Park on Wednesday evening, leaving a four-year-old toddler and three others injured during a memorial service. Police confirmed that five suspects opened f...

item.title: Federal Government Commits to Consult First Nations on Major Projects
item.description: Federal ministers have pledged to consult First Nations communities on major projects under Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government, emphasizing partnership and collaboration. However, delegates at th...

item.title: Amal Mathew and Satya Dash Win 2026 Osmosis Poetry Prize
item.description: The 2026 Osmosis Poetry Prize, instituted in 2025 by poets Yashasvi Vachhani, Kunjana Parashar, and Kinjal Sethia, has been won by Amal Mathew and Satya Dash. The prize celebrates contemporary Indian ...

item.title: Vintage Photos of Gina Lollobrigida on Set of 1959 Film 'The Law'
item.description: This article showcases stunning vintage photographs capturing Italian actress Gina Lollobrigida during the filming of the 1959 drama 'The Law' (La legge). Taken on location in southern Italy's sun-dre...

item.title: EU and UK Wildlife Laws Need Overhaul to Recognize Animal Sentience
item.description: A new study published in the Journal of International Wildlife Law & Policy highlights significant flaws in the EU and UK's wildlife protection frameworks. Researchers Dr. Caroline Cox and Dr. Meganne...

item.title: Phillip Island weather forecast: Access blocked for crawler bots
item.description: The article discusses an error message encountered when attempting to access a news story about Phillip Island weather. News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic, whic...

item.title: Carney faces scrutiny over U.S. bridge toll deal and trade diversification's impact on food quality
item.description: The article highlights key issues from the National Post's afternoon front page. Mark Carney, Canada's former central bank governor, is under pressure to clarify the terms of a confidential toll-shari...

item.title: NEET UG 2026 Results: State-wise Toppers and Key Statistics Revealed
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the results of the NEET UG 2026 exam, marking a significant milestone in the medical admissions process. Over 11.21 lakh candidates qualified for undergr...

item.title: Shania Twain and Josh Homme Collaborate on New Single 'Faded Blue Jeans' from Upcoming Album
item.description: Shania Twain has collaborated with Queens Of The Stone Age frontman Josh Homme on her new single 'Faded Blue Jeans', the final preview of her upcoming album 'Little Miss Twain', set for release on Jul...

item.title: Erica Schwartz's Confirmation Hearing Highlights Challenges at CDC
item.description: Erica Schwartz, nominee to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), faced scrutiny during her confirmation hearing, where she was questioned about her stance on the Trump administrat...

item.title: Tinubu officially names Shettima as 2027 vice-presidential candidate
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has officially confirmed Kashim Shettima as his running mate for the 2027 presidential election through a formal certificate presentation. The event, shared by Tinubu's social me...

item.title: Investigator Continues Testimony at Madlanga Commission
item.description: Brian Padayachee, an investigator from the Investigative Directorate Against Corruption (Idac), is continuing his testimony before the Madlanga commission of inquiry. The commission is examining alleg...

item.title: House Prosecutors Consider Waiving Evidence on One Impeachment Article Against Sara Duterte
item.description: The House prosecution panel is considering waiving the presentation of evidence on one of the four impeachment articles against Vice President Sara Duterte if the evidence from the remaining articles ...

item.title: Government bans high-caffeine energy drinks for under-16s in England from April
item.description: The UK government has announced a ban on high-caffeine energy drinks for children under 16 in England, effective from April 2027. The regulation prohibits the sale of drinks containing more than 150mg...

item.title: Supreme Court says third language should begin earlier than Class IX to avoid burden on board exam students
item.description: The Supreme Court observed that introducing a third language only from Class IX could place an unnecessary academic burden on students who are already preparing for their board examinations. The remar...

item.title: Respected Community Leader Mary Amaechi Dies at 89
item.description: The family of former Rivers State Governor and African Democratic Congress (ADC) vice-presidential candidate Rotimi Amaechi announced the peaceful passing of his mother, Mary Amaechi, at the age of 89...

item.title: Aldi settles underpayment claims with $50 million payout
item.description: The article reports that Aldi, the German supermarket chain, has agreed to pay over $50 million to workers who were underpaid during their employment. The settlement comes after investigations reveale...

item.title: Vancouver Whitecaps vs. Chicago Fire match postponed over hazardous air quality
item.description: The Vancouver Whitecaps FC's scheduled match against the Chicago Fire at Soldier Field has been rescheduled for Tuesday, October 6, due to hazardous wildfire smoke affecting air quality in the region....

item.title: Metrorail commuter harassed by security guards for not greeting on Cape Town train
item.description: Lumka Mbele, a Metrorail commuter and influencer, shared a harrowing experience of being physically assaulted by security guards on a Cape Town train after refusing to reciprocate a flirtatious greeti...
